Class Appointment

java.lang.Object
com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.Appointment
public class Appointment extends Object
Represents an appointment booked by a visitor for a specific property.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Tala Khraim, Sara Sawalha, Masar Jabr

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Appointment()
    Default constructor for frameworks that require no-arg constructor.
    Appointment(String propertyId, String visitorId, com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.TimeSlot slot, com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.enums.AppointmentType type)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    cancel()
    Cancels the appointment by setting its status to CANCELLED.
    void
    complete()
    Marks the appointment as completed by setting its status to COMPLETED.
    void
    confirm()
    Confirms the appointment by setting its status to CONFIRMED.
    String
    getId()
    Returns the unique identifier of the appointment.
    String
    getPropertyId()
    Returns the property ID associated with this appointment.
    com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.TimeSlot
    getSlot()
    Returns the time slot of the appointment.
    com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.enums.AppointmentStatus
    getStatus()
    Returns the current status of the appointment.
    com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.enums.AppointmentType
    getType()
    Returns the type of this appointment.
    String
    getVisitorId()
    Returns the visitor ID who booked this appointment.
    boolean
    isFuture()
    Checks if the appointment is scheduled for a future time.
    void
    setPropertyId(String propertyId)
    Sets the property ID for this appointment.
    void
    setSlot(com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.TimeSlot slot)
    Sets the time slot for the appointment.
    void
    setStatus(com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.enums.AppointmentStatus status)
    Sets the status of the appointment.
    void
    setVisitorId(String visitorId)
    Sets the visitor ID for this appointment.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a string representation of the appointment.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(String propertyId, String visitorId, com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.TimeSlot slot, com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.enums.AppointmentType type)
      Parameters:
      propertyId - the ID of the property being booked
      visitorId - the ID of the visitor making the booking
      slot - the time slot for the appointment
      type - the type of appointment (determines duration)

    • Appointment

      public Appointment()
      Default constructor for frameworks that require no-arg constructor.

  • Method Details

    • getSlot

      public com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.TimeSlot getSlot()
      Returns the time slot of the appointment.
      Returns:
      the TimeSlot object containing start time and availability

    • setSlot

      public void setSlot(com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.TimeSlot slot)
      Sets the time slot for the appointment.
      Parameters:
      slot - the new TimeSlot for the appointment

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of the appointment.
      Returns:
      the appointment ID (UUID format)

    • getPropertyId

      public String getPropertyId()
      Returns the property ID associated with this appointment.
      Returns:
      the property ID

    • setPropertyId

      public void setPropertyId(String propertyId)
      Sets the property ID for this appointment.
      Parameters:
      propertyId - the new property ID

    • getVisitorId

      public String getVisitorId()
      Returns the visitor ID who booked this appointment.
      Returns:
      the visitor ID

    • setVisitorId

      public void setVisitorId(String visitorId)
      Sets the visitor ID for this appointment.
      Parameters:
      visitorId - the new visitor ID

    • getType

      public com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.enums.AppointmentType getType()
      Returns the type of this appointment.
      Returns:
      the AppointmentType (URGENT, FOLLOW_UP, VIRTUAL, IN_PERSON, GROUP)

    • getStatus

      public com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.enums.AppointmentStatus getStatus()
      Returns the current status of the appointment.
      Returns:
      the AppointmentStatus (CONFIRMED, CANCELLED, COMPLETED)

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(com.appointmentsystem.domain.models.enums.AppointmentStatus status)
      Sets the status of the appointment.
      Parameters:
      status - the new AppointmentStatus

    • confirm

      public void confirm()
      Confirms the appointment by setting its status to CONFIRMED.

    • cancel

      public void cancel()
      Cancels the appointment by setting its status to CANCELLED.

    • complete

      public void complete()
      Marks the appointment as completed by setting its status to COMPLETED.

    • isFuture

      public boolean isFuture()
      Checks if the appointment is scheduled for a future time.
      Returns:
      true if the appointment's start time is after the current time, false otherwise

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the appointment. The format includes propertyId, visitorId, and status.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a formatted string containing appointment information
